South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.raw: Impact on prediction markets:** Likely bearish for "war is over" bets (e.g., YES shares drop) due to escalated alert status; bullish for conflict continuation markets. [2]

signals.headline: A YouTube live stream from April 15 reports Trump declaring the "era of endless wars" over amid Middle East breakthrough
signals.raw: A YouTube live stream from April 15 reports Trump declaring the "era of endless wars" over amid Middle East breakthroughs and a Strait of Hormuz blockade, but this predates today and lacks independent confirmation of war termination. [1]
